verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The greatest thing in all my life is knowing You The greatest thing in all my life is knowing You I want to know You more, I want to know You more. The greatest thing in all my life is knowing You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The greatest thing in all my life is loving You, The greatest thing in all my life is loving You; I want to love You more, I want to love You more, The greatest thing in all my life is loving You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The greatest thing in all my life is serving You, The greatest thing in all my life is serving You; I want to serve You more, I want to serve You more, The greatest thing in all my life is serving You.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The greatest thing in all my life is praising You, The greatest thing in all my life is praising You, I want to praise You more, I want to praise You more, The greatest thing in all my life is praise You.
